summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json, which is a metadata/tracking file that records feature requests as 'pending'. None of the actual implementation files (cpclGenerator.ts, cpclLayoutAdjustments.ts, LabelSettingsTab.tsx, labelSettingsStore.ts, ScanPrintTab.tsx, soundSystem.ts) were modified. All three requirements are entirely unimplemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Reduce the default barcode width in the CPCL generator so that both barcodes fit fully within the printable area of the label without being clipped on either side, enforcing a safe maximum width based on label dimensions minus left/right margins.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes were made to cpclGenerator.ts or cpclLayoutAdjustments.ts. The feature is only recorded as 'pending' in project_state.json.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a 'Barcode Width' numeric input control in LabelSettingsTab.tsx, persist it in labelSettingsStore.ts, apply it in cpclGenerator.ts, reflect it in label preview, and include it in settings import/export.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes were made to LabelSettingsTab.tsx, labelSettingsStore.ts, or cpclGenerator.ts. The feature is only recorded as 'pending' in project_state.json.

missing_requirements.requirement: In ScanPrintTab.tsx, compare the 2nd scanned serial against the 1st; if identical, show an error message, play error sound via soundSystem.ts, clear the 2nd input, and prevent printing.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes were made to ScanPrintTab.tsx or soundSystem.ts. The feature is only recorded as 'pending' in project_state.json.
